evidence.scientific_clarity: Pipeline flow and proportional widths are readable, but Reject node is placed at the final column (same as Train/Val/Test) rather than branching off at each rejection stage, obscuring when losses occur.
evidence.typography: pdf.fonttype=42 and svg.fonttype='none' both set; Arial/Helvetica leads the font stack (not DejaVu Sans default); no Type3 fonts in PDF; label sizes 8.5px/title 11px are appropriate.
evidence.palette: Red for Reject is directionally appropriate; blue-to-green pipeline progression is logical; but the 7-color palette is not a formally colorblind-safe set (no Okabe-Ito or similar), and Val gold (#B7950B) vs Test purple (#884EA0) may be hard to distinguish under deuteranopia.
evidence.layout_density: Four columns well-distributed across 9x5 canvas; labels placed outside nodes without overlap; however, four nodes stacked at the right column (Train/Val/Test/Reject) is slightly crowded and the Reject placement is spatially misleading.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption numbers are wrong vs. the figure: caption says '1,000 raw samples' but figure shows Raw=1,120; caption says '820 pass initial cleaning' but figure shows Cleaned=1,000; caption says '60 further rejected' but 1,000-820=180 rejected at filtering stage.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF embeds TrueType fonts via CIDFontType2+FontFile2 with no Type3 glyphs; pdf.fonttype=42 confirmed in script and verified in binary; SVG uses fonttype='none' yielding editable text.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (18 KB), figure.png (92 KB), figure.svg (8.3 KB), caption.tex, and gen_figure.py all present and non-trivial; bonus SVG output.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption contains numerical claims but they are factually inconsistent with the figure (Raw 1,000 vs 1,120; Cleaned 820 vs 1,000; second-stage rejects 60 vs 180); 'filtered to yield 820 usable records' is tautological; the reader cannot reconcile caption numbers with what they see.

overall_strengths: Excellent vector/font hygiene: pdf.fonttype=42, svg.fonttype=none, TrueType embedded, no Type3 — figure is fully editable in Illustrator/Inkscape.
All required output files are present and non-trivial; the custom cubic-Bezier ribbon implementation produces a clean, publication-quality Sankey layout.
overall_weaknesses: Caption numbers are substantially wrong relative to the figure (Raw 1,000 vs 1,120; Cleaned 820 vs 1,000; second-stage rejects 60 vs 180) — a Reviewer 2 rejection risk.
Reject node is placed at the terminal column alongside Train/Val/Test rather than branching off at each stage, hiding the two-stage attrition structure that is the scientific point of the diagram.
